jd: We are looking for a Python and FastAPI Web Developer who knows MongoDB and Git.

"About the job
About Corzly

Corzly is a remote-first hospitality operations company. We're the operations team behind smarter short-term rental managers. Our partners are STR owners and managers around the world who keep their properties, brand, and accounts, while we run listings, guest communication, pricing, and daily coordination behind the scenes.

Founded in 2017, we now support a growing portfolio of partners across dozens of cities and countries with a team of 20+ full-time remote experts. We're also building our own proprietary software platform alongside the industry's best third-party tools, including The Hub (our partner portal), our Command Center (internal operations dashboard), System 1 (revenue management), and Smoothly (ground operations AI).

We're hiring a back-end Listings Systems Specialist to support our software team and keep every property in our portfolio dialed in across all of our systems.

About The Role

This is a back-end, non-customer-facing role. You'll work directly with our software team to make sure every listing is set up correctly inside our property management system, channel manager, pricing engine, and supporting tools. You'll be the bridge between our software systems and our front-end listing specialists, freeing them up to focus on partners and properties.

If you're detail-oriented, systems-minded, and you like the satisfaction of turning messy data into clean systems that run smoothly, this role is for you.

What You'll Do

 System Setup and Configuration
Configure new properties inside HostAway, Breezeway, PriceLabs, Charge Automation, Authenticate, and our proprietary tools
Build out channel connections to Airbnb, VRBO, Expedia, Booking.com, and other distribution platforms
Set up automations, message templates, fees, taxes, and policies inside our PMS
 Listing Data and Quality
Audit existing listings for missing or inaccurate data and fix the gaps
Maintain our central amenities database and keep property attributes consistent across every platform
Verify rates, availability, minimum stays, and policies are accurate everywhere a listing appears
 Software Team Support
Work directly with our developers on testing, bug reporting, and rolling out new internal tools
Help migrate data between systems during partner onboarding
Document processes and build SOPs as our systems evolve
 Front-End Team Support
Be the back-end resource our listing specialists rely on to get things done in the software
Troubleshoot integration issues, sync errors, and platform problems so the front-end team can keep moving
Flag patterns that suggest a system improvement is needed

Requirements

What We're Looking For

Fluent written and spoken English is required. All work, training, documentation, and team communication happen in English
Comfortable in software systems and tools, with sharp attention to detail
Self-directed and reliable in a fully remote environment
Experience with PMS or channel manager platforms (HostAway, Guesty, Hospitable, OwnerRez, etc.) is a strong plus
Experience in the short-term rental industry is a plus but not required

Application Deadline

Please submit your application by Friday, June 5, 2026.

Benefits

Compensation and Schedule

Salary: $500 USD per month
Start date: Early July 2026
Status: Full-time, 40 hours/week
Schedule: Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM CST, with Mandatory Virtual Office Hours from 8:00 AM to 12:00 PM CST
The USA observes daylight savings time, so the local time relative to your location may shift by one hour once per year
Overtime: We try to avoid it and it shouldn't be necessary, but if it's absolutely necessary we will pay at 1.5x your daily salary rate
Payments: Made monthly on the last business day of each month. We'll request your bank details directly from our bank (most of our team uses Wise)
Productivity and Time Tracking: Trackabi is required for all working time"
